top_findings.summary: The skill description includes accessing the user's Chrome browser profile (via `ordercli foodora session chrome --url https://www.foodora.at/ --profile "Default"`) to extract session data for login. This action requires permissions to sensitive browser information, such as cookies or storage, that may contain data unrelated to Foodora orders (e.g., other websites' credentials, browsing history). While authentication is necessary for the primary purpose of reordering and tracking food orders, this method is excessive and invasive compared to standard login alternatives (e.g., email/password input), as it exposes broader user data beyond the scope of the skill's stated goal.
